title: Week 1: Introduction to Software Engineering
description: Overview of Software Engineering and Development Lifecycles, establishing foundational knowledge in software engineering.

title: Week 2: Software Development Methodologies
description: Exploration of Agile vs. Waterfall Methodologies and the Scrum Framework, focusing on different approaches to software development.

title: Week 3: Foundations of Programming
description: Introduction to Object-Oriented Programming concepts, laying the groundwork for programming practices.

title: Week 4: Problem-Solving & Algorithms
description: Techniques for problem-solving and an introduction to algorithms, enhancing analytical skills in coding.

title: Week 5: Data Structures
description: Study of common data structures such as arrays, lists, and trees, essential for effective coding.

title: Week 6: Version Control Systems
description: Fundamentals of Git and collaborative software development practices to manage code changes effectively.

title: Week 7: Testing and Quality Assurance
description: Understanding the importance of testing in software development, including unit and integration testing.

title: Week 8: Automated Testing Tools
description: Utilization of JUnit and pytest for unit testing, expanding knowledge in automated testing frameworks.

title: Week 9: Ethical Dilemmas in Software Engineering
description: Analysis of ethical dilemmas through case studies, focusing on the social impact of software engineering.

title: Week 10: Technical Documentation
description: Best practices for writing effective technical documentation, crucial for effective communication in software projects.

title: Week 11: Software Design Patterns
description: Introduction to design patterns such as Singleton and Observer, enhancing software design skills.

title: Week 12: Group Project Presentations
description: Student presentations of group projects to showcase collaboration and application of learned concepts.

title: Week 13: Review and Examination Preparation
description: Comprehensive review of key concepts to prepare for the final exam, reinforcing the learning material.

title: Week 14: Final Exam
description: A comprehensive final exam covering all course content, assessing the students' overall understanding of software engineering principles.
